name: ide-token-graph-tracker
description: Track Codex prompts, responses, models, and reported token usage from local Codex session logs in near real time.

commands.title: Codex Token Tracker: Add Log Folder
Codex Token Tracker: Export Ledger JSON
Codex Token Tracker: Open Local Storage
Codex Token Tracker: Show Capture Notes

aiTokenTracker.sources.description: Additional folders to scan for JSON, JSONL, and text AI logs.

aiTokenTracker.fullScanIntervalMs.description: Safety full-scan interval for folders that cannot be watched directly. Real-time capture uses file watchers first.

aiTokenTracker.realtimeCapture.description: Watch known Codex session folders and update the graph as soon as JSONL logs change.

aiTokenTracker.realtimeDebounceMs.description: Delay before parsing changed log files. Lower values feel more live; higher values reduce duplicate work while responses stream.

aiTokenTracker.maxRealtimeBatchFiles.description: Maximum changed files to parse in one realtime batch.

aiTokenTracker.savePromptsAndOutputs.description: Save prompt and output text in the local ledger.

aiTokenTracker.maxFileSizeMb.description: Maximum AI log file size to parse.

aiTokenTracker.maxFilesPerSource.description: Maximum recent log files to inspect during a full scan of each source.

aiTokenTracker.webviewRecordLimit.description: Maximum recent prompt/output records sent to the dashboard webview. Export still includes the full ledger.

aiTokenTracker.processRefreshIntervalMs.description: How often to refresh the lightweight Code/Codex process list.

aiTokenTracker.inputCostPerMillion.description: Input token cost per 1M tokens for your Codex model. Leave 0 to disable cost estimation.

aiTokenTracker.cachedInputCostPerMillion.description: Cached input token cost per 1M tokens for your Codex model. Leave 0 if unknown.

aiTokenTracker.outputCostPerMillion.description: Output token cost per 1M tokens for your Codex model. Leave 0 to disable cost estimation.

aiTokenTracker.reasoningOutputCostPerMil.description: Reasoning output token cost per 1M tokens. Leave 0 to use the output token rate.
